prompt: A cinematic golden-hour fashion portrait of a glamorous young blonde woman taking a selfie in a sunlit countryside field filled with tall dry golden grass. She has long wavy platinum blonde hair, soft freckles, glowing skin, and a playful expression while winking and making a kissy face toward her bright pink smartphone held high in one hand. She wears a black western cowboy hat with a metallic sheriff-style badge on the front, a red-and-white gingham plaid crop top tied at the waist with flared sleeves, black high-waisted leather shorts with soft fur trim, and black fishnet tights. A jeweled belly button piercing and subtle arm tattoos are visible, adding edgy detail to the western glam aesthetic. Warm sunset lighting creates soft cinematic highlights and golden rim light around her hair and body. The background features blurred countryside scenery with shallow depth of field, creating a dreamy luxury editorial atmosphere.
